description:
Add size-limit or bundlesize to CI pipeline with budgets (main < 200KB gzipped, any chunk < 50KB). Fail PRs exceeding limits. Integrate Lighthouse CI for Web Vitals tracking.

**Rationale:** Bundle creep is invisible without measurement. CI enforcement prevents accidental bloat and provides data-driven performance decisions.
title: CI bundle size budgets and regression monitoring

descriptionHistory.description:
Add size-limit or bundlesize to CI pipeline with budgets (main < 200KB gzipped, any chunk < 50KB). Fail PRs exceeding limits. Integrate Lighthouse CI for Web Vitals tracking.
